title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah pays tribute to the great patriot and nationalist writer Bankim Chandra Chattopadhyay on his death anniversary
text:
Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Home Affairs

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah pays tribute to the great patriot and nationalist writer Bankim Chandra Chattopadhyay on his death anniversary

Bankim Babu played an unforgettable role in awakening Indian self-respect, which had been hurt by the exploitation and injustice of Mughal invaders and British rulers
Bankim Chandra Chattopadhyay gave a unifying voice to the freedom struggle—divided by language, region, and provinces—through Vande Mataram
This nation, this civilization, and this great culture will remain eternally indebted to Bankim Babu for inspiring the youth to strive for freedom and to protect the motherland

Posted On:
08 APR 2026 1:48PM by PIB Delhi

Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah paid humble tribute to the great patriot and nationalist writer Bankim Chandra Chattopadhyay on his death anniversary.

In a post on ‘X’, Shri Amit Shah said, “Bankim Babu played an unforgettable role in awakening Indian self-respect, which had been hurt by the exploitation and injustice of Mughal invaders and British rulers. Through Vande Mataram, he gave a unifying voice to the freedom struggle divided by language, region, and provinces. By vividly portraying the grand form of Mother India through Anandamath, he inspired the youth to strive for freedom and to protect the motherland. This nation, this civilization, and this great culture will remain eternally indebted to Bankim Babu for his contributions.”

महान देशभक्त और राष्ट्रवादी साहित्यकार बंकिम चंद्र चट्टोपाध्याय जी की पुण्यतिथि पर उन्हें विनम्र श्रद्धांजलि अर्पित करता हूँ।
बंकिम बाबू ने मुगल आक्रांताओं और अंग्रेजी शासकों के शोषण और अन्याय से आहत भारतीय स्वाभिमान को जगाने का अविस्मरणीय कार्य किया। उन्होंने ‘वन्दे मातरम्’ के…
pic.twitter.com/Fti0qX7WGG
— Amit Shah (@AmitShah)
April 8, 2026

***

RK/PR/PS/SK

(Release ID: 2249975)
